rare_note: adjtimex, settimeofday, clock_settime are administrative time-setting syscalls, fired a handful of times per day at most (f3 section 3.5: rare syscalls = LOW, 1-100/day). A naive 'any -S rule is HIGH' classifier over-warns by orders of magnitude.

rules.note: adjtimex + settimeofday OR'd. Rare administrative syscalls => LOW (1-100/day, f3 section 3.5/6).
clock_settime, same time_change key. Rare => LOW. (Shares key with the rule above; per-key total sums the two, scenario 31 territory.)

rate_band_basis: f3 section 6: rare syscall LOW 1-100/day. Time-setting syscalls fire rarely on a stable host.
